A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

any details of hare krishna centre in dubai

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-09-16 · 3 answers
I have heard there is a hare krishna centre/restaurant in dubai, can anyone verify this, any contact details would be appreciated.
user [38] · 2007-09-16
Try iskcon.dubai(at)pamho.net
user [152] · 2007-09-16
I have just tried iskcon.dubai(at)pamho.net but my browser just takes me to google seach page results & none of the results seem to be the correct one, could some try please.
user [38] · 2007-09-16
This is an email. Put @ instead of (at).
